items.claim: Ramazan Temirov is coming off of a suspension for PEDs.
items.quote: coming in Ramazan. Come on. What am I doing? Temirov is coming off of the suspension for PEDs

items.claim: Steve Erceg is quite hittable and Ramazan Temirov throws a lot of heat.
items.quote: he is quite hittable and this guy does throw a lot of heat.

items.claim: Mike Davis is simply a better fighter than Nurullo Aliev.
items.quote: I do think that Mike Davis is just a better fighter here.

items.claim: Nurullo Aliev is not a very slick grappler and is a willing wrestler rather than a submission threat.
items.quote: Nurullo Aliev is not a very slick grappler. He's a willing wrestler, but he's not somebody who's going to throw you in a lot of submissions or catch you in something.

items.claim: Mike Davis should be able to outbox Nurullo Aliev at striking range with speed, power combinations, and counter striking.
items.quote: at striking range, he shouldn't be boxing with Mike Davis. He really shouldn't. Mike Davis should be able to put speed, power combinations on him, counter strike effectively

items.claim: Muhammad Saeed is making his UFC debut this week and is undefeated at nine and zero.
items.quote: One of six guys making his UFC debut this week... the guy who's nine and 0, it doesn't show it here, but he's nine and 0

items.claim: Saygid Izagakhmaev gassed out in his UFC debut after a really long layoff and inactivity.
items.quote: Izagakhmaev looked like in his UFC debut, not good. He gassed against somebody who he was supposed to beat... It was also after a really long layoff, a lot of inactivity.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev is much better than Bogdan Guskov and is likely to finish the fight.
items.quote: Magomed Ankalaev one is much better than Bogdan Guskov. Even if this was three rounds, I'd still think that Magomed Ankalaev is going to finish the fight.

items.claim: Bogdan Guskov is taking the fight against Magomed Ankalaev on short notice in Abu Dhabi over five rounds.
items.quote: Guskov taking this fight on short notice in this environment over five rounds, just not going to work.
